headline: Regeneron Broadens Pipeline With Ebola Antibody Trials And Bispecific Cancer Bets
summary: World Health Organization prioritizes Regeneron’s maftivimab for clinical trials targeting Bundibugyo ebolavirus as part of the global Ebola emergency response. Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NasdaqGS:REGN) expands its collaboration with CytomX to develop conditionally activated bispecific cancer therapies. For Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NasdaqGS:REGN), these updates highlight the company’s activity in both infectious disease and oncology. The World Health Organization’s focus on maftivimab...
